title: 15 Killed as Speedboat Capsizes in Vietnam
summary_full: A speedboat was carrying 36 people when it overturned near the island of Phu Quoc in southern Vietnam. The other people onboard were rescued alive.
summary_public: A speedboat was carrying 36 people when it overturned near the island of Phu Quoc in southern Vietnam. The other people onboard were rescued alive.
